_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Confusion or loss of consciousness for even a brief moment
Loss of vision or changes in vision

preauth.label: Clinical Notes including evaluation findings, indications for the procedure, and planned line of treatment

claim.label: Detailed Indoor case papers with treatment given

ppd_preauth.q: Was the patient had Blood pressure above 180/120 mm/hg?

common_queries: Patient's blood pressure not documented or documented below 180/120 mm/hg without justification for Accelerated Hypertension
Clinical notes, evaluation findings, indications, or planned line of treatment missing or incomplete
Detailed Indoor Case Papers with vital (BP and Pulse) or Treatment details missing
Detailed Discharge Summary missing or missing date of follow-up
